ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "playerId" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., GK, DR, DC, DL) */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in cm */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kg */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "dateOfBirth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "contractExpiry" TEXT /* Contract expiry date of the player */,
  "injuryStatus" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playerId"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position FOREIGN KEY ("position") REFERENCES positions ("positionName")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "matchId" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "teamId" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing the match */,
  "teamName" TEXT /* Name of the team playing the match */,
  "matchDate" TEXT /* Date the match was played */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "opponentTeamId" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "opponentTeamName" TEXT /* Name of the opposing team */,
  "matchFormat" TEXT /* Format of the match (e.g., league, cup) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("matchId")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_ratings" (
  "ratingId" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player rating */,
  "playerId" INTEGER /* ID of the player being rated */,
  "matchId" INTEGER /* ID of the match being played */,
  "ratings" TEXT /* Ratings of the player for the match (in JSON format) */,
  "ratingVersion" INTEGER /* Version of the player rating */,
  "ratingDate" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratingId"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_ratings_playerId FOREIGN KEY ("playerId") REFERENCES players ("playerId"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_ratings_matchId FOREIGN KEY ("matchId") REFERENCES matches ("matchId")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_ratings" (
  "ratingId" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team rating */,
  "matchId" INTEGER /* ID of the match being played */,
  "teamId" INTEGER /* ID of the team being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the team for the match */,
  "ratingVersion" INTEGER /* Version of the team rating */,
  "ratingDate" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratingId"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_ratings_matchId FOREIGN KEY ("matchId") REFERENCES matches ("matchId"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_ratings_teamId FOREIGN KEY ("teamId") REFERENCES matches ("teamId")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_metadata" (
  "metaId" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player metadata */,
  "playerId" INTEGER /* ID of the player being described */,
  "isStarter" INTEGER /* Whether the player is a starter */,
  "isManOfTheMatch" INTEGER /* Whether the player is the man of the match */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season in which the metadata applies */,
  "gamesPlayed" INTEGER /* Number of games the player has played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metaId"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_metadata_playerId FOREIGN KEY ("playerId") REFERENCES players ("playerId")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "positionId" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "positionName" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., GK, DR, DC, DL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the position (e.g., defensive, offensive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("positionId")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "userId" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "userName" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "passwordHash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "lastLogin" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("userId")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "accessId" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "userId" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "matchId" INTEGER /* ID of the match being accessed */,
  "accessDate" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "accessType" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ipAddress" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "userAgent" TEXT /* User agent string of the accessing device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accessId"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_userId FOREIGN KEY ("userId") REFERENCES users ("userId"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_matchId FOREIGN KEY ("matchId") REFERENCES matches ("matchId")
)
